query:
UPDATE island_guides 
SET nearbyAirports = JSON_ARRAY(
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'name', 'Dharavandhoo Airport',
    'code', 'DRV',
    'distance', 'On island',
    'flightTime', '30-45 minutes from Male',
    'airlines', JSON_ARRAY('Maldivian Air Taxi', 'Heli Air Maldives'),
    'description', 'Direct flights from Male (MLE) to Dharavandhoo (DRV). Fastest way to reach the island with scenic aerial views.'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'name', 'Male International Airport',
    'code', 'MLE',
    'distance', 'Requires ferry/speedboat',
    'flightTime', 'International hub',
    'airlines', JSON_ARRAY('Multiple international carriers'),
    'description', 'Main international airport. Fly here first, then take domestic flight or ferry to Dharavandhoo.'
  )
)
WHERE slug = 'dharavandhoo-baa'
